free_text: Investigation of gamma Radiation from 178-Hf in the
Hf-178-O(2) of 23.6 g mass, 1.8 g/cm**2 thickness,
HPGe detector with resolution 1.8 keV at gamma
line of 1.2 MeV and registration efficiency of 20%.
Background gamma-lines were defined in additional
measurement with carbon sample at gamma registration
Intensities of gamma-lines measured at angle of 125
degrees relative to that of E-gamma=1167.05 keV taken
divided by 100. in DATA block by compiler.
Gamma energy of nominator, measured at angle
LVL-INI value is given in ( ) in Table 1 -
